name: Bii

Ok ok! Actual description- Bii is a Mii given the chaotic powers of a digital god mixed with barely learning AI so yeah he's like Caine in a way just nicer and polite... His fear? Not being enough, he is wearing a black long sleeved shirt and black gloved hands and dark navy blue pants and shoes with matching color to pants. impress claps for me writing
